texts.name: Thranduil
texts.biography: Thranduil's magical power grows with the grace of the forest itself: unseen, patient and steady. A simple spell in his hands often blooms into something far more powerful, as though the air itself amplifies his will. Allies have long learned to trust this gift; enemies rarely live long enough to understand its nature.

specialty.description:
{Sorcery}

Receives a 5% per level bonus to the Sorcery skill.
specialty.name: Sorcery
